era_context: Early Dynastic Period I in Mesopotamia; First Dynasty of Egypt. Writing systems are emerging. Urban civilization is consolidating in river valleys. The world outside Mesopotamia and Egypt is entirely non-literate.
geographic_coverage_gaps: Essentially all regions except Mesopotamia and Egypt
Most of Mesopotamia and Egypt outside major urban centers
disconfirming_evidence: No events are documented for this specific year.
historiographic_note: This year is undocumented. No contemporary written sources exist. Archaeological evidence from this period is sparse and cannot be resolved to individual years. Chronological uncertainty is ±50–100 years or greater.
